query:
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS planTier ENUM('trial','standard','pro','enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trialRunsRemaining INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trialStartedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trialExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyRunsLimit INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyRunsUsed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS billingCycleAnchor TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS convertedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay1SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay15SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay45SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay55SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay60SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalCompletedRuns INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalAgentsFired INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS planTier ENUM('trial','standard','pro','enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trialRunsRemaining INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trialStartedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS trialExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyRunsLimit INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyRunsUsed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS billingCycleAnchor TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS convertedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeCustomerId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS stripeSubscriptionId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay1SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay15SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay45SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay55SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS emailDay60SentAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalCompletedRuns INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalAgentsFired INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
